name: M-120
events: 28 Sep 1942 M-120 fires two torpedoes against the Romanian torpedo boat Naluca off the mouth of the Sulina river, Romania in position 45°32'N, 29°50'E. Both torpedoes missed their target.

26 May 1947 M-120 scuttled the wrecks of the German U-boats U-18 and U-24 with torpedoes off Sevastopol. The U-boats had been scuttled by the Germans off Constanza in August 1944, were later raised by the Soviets and towed to Sevastopol.
